positional_bias.note: Re-derived = line index per MCQ from quiz.gift: q1=1, q2=3, q3=0, q4=2, q5=3, q6=0. Matches sidecar correct_positions_in_order [1,3,0,2,3,0] and correct_position_distribution [2,1,1,2] (post re-shuffle; TRY-1 was [0,2,3,1,0,2]). $bias_defense_applied=true confirmed. No clustering, all 4 positions used, max_share 0.333 <= 0.40.

length_bias.note: Fresh char-length measure (feedback stripped). The TRY-1 offenders are fixed: q1 correct trimmed to 88 (now shortest option), q2 to 96, q6 to 98 (now below distractor mean). No correct answer exceeds 1.20x its distractor mean. longest_correct_rate 0.00 (was 0.50). Confirms sidecar claim independently.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors are believable beginner misconceptions grounded in the corpus: transparency=publishing code / accuracy / speed; fairness=deleting labels (corpus 5.1 proxy point) / identical outputs / diverse team; accountability='the algorithm decided' gap / blame-the-victim / regulator-only; harm prevention=reactive bug-fix / disclaimer / zero-failure; interdependence=independent pillars / three-quarters ethical / transparency compensates; q6=only-transparency / only-fairness / none. No score-1 throwaways. Post-revise distractor lengthening did not introduce absurd content.

objective_coverage.note: All 5 Learning Objectives (corpus 3) tested by >=1 question. No orphan objective_ref.

beginner_fairness_on_headline.note: Stems plain-language; AI/HR everyday or corpus-defined. Every question tests THIS topic (the four pillars) only. No red-teaming (deferred to next topic in corpus 5.4) or XAI internals required to answer - XAI is only mention-and-deferred in corpus, never tested. q6 references Amazon hiring from 5.1, an earlier topic in sequence (fair). No out_of_scope_question, no scope_creep.

gift_validity.note: Parses as clean Moodle GIFT. $CATEGORY present. q1-q6 MCQ = exactly one = plus three ~; q7 short-answer = three accepted = answers, no ~. All answer lines have well-formed #feedback; #### general-feedback lines well-formed. No unescaped control chars.

verdict: Pass (TRY 2) - length bias resolved. Fresh measurement: longest_correct_rate 0.00 (TRY-1 was 0.50); no correct answer is the systematically-longest option (q1/q2/q6 trimmed, distractors fattened). Positional bias clean (max_share 0.333, meta/gift in sync after re-shuffle, $bias_defense_applied verified true). Distractor plausibility (absurd_rate 0.00), objective coverage (all 5 LOs), beginner-fairness/on-headline scope, and GIFT validity all pass.
